phaseSummary.name: Design foundation: blue interactive accent token + reference light theme
Home Today's Progress -> Steps + Total Calories Burned only, ring = genuine plan %
Workout: routines moved onto Workout page, 2 recent sessions + Show All, rest-timer default 0
Profile: Body Fat % removed from Log Weight, PR + Achievement entry points, body-progress photos (IndexedDB)
Progress: Habit Tracker (new feature); redundant Nutrition Progress investigated (not actually redundant, documented)
Calculator consolidation verified already-done; blue interactive accent extended to legacy selection chips/tabs
Full regression sweep + final clean Android build + report

filesCreated: AGENTS.md (pre-existing untracked, first committed this task)

dataAndStorageChanges.migrations: None required. Habit keys are brand-new (default to []/{}). defaultRest change 90->0 needs no migration (existing installs already persist their own value). No existing key was renamed, deleted, or reshaped.
dataAndStorageChanges.removed: The bodyfat field is no longer WRITTEN by new Log Entry submissions, but historical bodylog entries that already have a .bodyfat value keep it (all readers treat it as optional), and the standalone Body Fat calculator + waist/neck Navy estimate remain.

knownLimitations: Start Workout's own per-reference visual redesign (numbered exercise rows with drag handle, muscle-diagram header) was not done -- it lives inside the still-un-extracted ~1,600-line active-session renderer in app.js; flagged for a future dedicated pass.
The reference's header theme-toggle button was not added (theme is still changed via Settings); this is an additive UI element, its absence breaks nothing.

Screenshot capture was unavailable in this environment for the entire task -- all visual verification used DOM structure, computed CSS, getBoundingClientRect(), and network/console inspection in a real browser session, never a rendered image.
No independent Playwright MCP pass and no real Android device testing were performed -- everything is STATICALLY VERIFIED + BROWSER VERIFIED + BUILD VERIFIED only.
